fit.yoe_required: At least 7 years progressively responsible L&D experience, with at least 5 years developing/delivering development programs for leaders (Required). Bachelor's in curriculum dev/education/HR/business or equivalent (Required).

fit.scope_match: STRONG. JD scope = designing/implementing learning strategies (AI Learning Pathways), updating leadership & skills training programs, partnering with senior leaders on essential-skills needs, building internal-mobility/continuous-development culture. Maps directly to Jamie's strengths: program management + L&D ops (InGenius: needs assessments -> 3 new programs, 20+ programs/10+ vendors, 600+ trainings, 70+ staff onboarding guides, 75% onboarding-time reduction) + MS Applied Org Psych (USC 3.95).

fit.notes: Title 'Program Manager IV' is a senior IC/program-leadership grade, not a people-manager-with-reports role per JD. Genuine stretch, surfaced + pursued per orchestrator instruction and loosened bar.
